name: STKHRKTE
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[STKHRKTE] ON [dbo].[STOKHAREKETLERI]
FOR DELETE
AS

SET NOCOUNT ON
 IF TRIGGER_NESTLEVEL() > 1
     RETURN

DECLARE @STOK_REF		INT
DECLARE @MIKTAR			FLOAT
DECLARE @TAKIP_NO		NVARCHAR(100)
DECLARE @AMBAR_KODU		NVARCHAR(15)
DECLARE @FB_REF			INT
DECLARE @FD_REF			INT  
DECLARE @ADRES			NVARCHAR(50) 
DECLARE @HEDEF_ADRES		NVARCHAR(50) 
DECLARE @HEDEF_AMBAR		NVARCHAR(15)
DECLARE @CARPAN1		FLOAT
DECLARE @CARPAN2		FLOAT
DECLARE @ANABIRIM_REF		INT
DECLARE @HAREKET_TARIHI		SMALLDATETIME
DECLARE @DURUM_KODU		NVARCHAR(50)
DECLARE @HEDEF_DURUM		NVARCHAR(50)
DECLARE @PALET			NVARCHAR(50)
DECLARE @HEDEF_PALET		NVARCHAR(50)
DECLARE @PAKET			NVARCHAR(50)
DECLARE @HEDEF_PAKET		NVARCHAR(50)
DECLARE @FIS_GCD		SMALLINT
DECLARE @FIS_TIPI		SMALLINT
DECLARE @FIS_TURU		NVARCHAR(5)
DECLARE @IZLEME_TURU		INT
DECLARE @KONSINYE_HAREKETI INT
DECLARE @KONSINYE_REF INT
DECLARE @KONSINYE_TM SMALLINT
DECLARE @FIS_TARIHI SMALLDATETIME
DECLARE @FIRMA_REF	INT
DECLARE @IADE_TARIHI SMALLDATETIME
DECLARE @KONSINYEFD_REF INT
DECLARE @BIRIM_REF	INT
DECLARE @SD_REF		INT
DECLARE @SB_REF		INT
DECLARE @IFD_REF	INT
DECLARE @PD_REF		INT
DECLARE @PB_REF		INT
DECLARE @TD_REF		INT
DECLARE @TB_REF		INT
DECLARE @STK_TARIHI SMALLDATETIME
DECLARE @GBS_TARIHI SMALLDATETIME
DECLARE @GBT_TARIHI SMALLDATETIME
DECLARE @URT_TARIHI SMALLDATETIME
DECLARE @RETEST_TARIHI SMALLDATETIME
DECLARE @ALAN1		NVARCHAR(100)
DECLARE @ALAN2		NVARCHAR(100)
DECLARE @ALAN3		NVARCHAR(100)
DECLARE @ALAN4		NVARCHAR(100)
DECLARE @VARYANT_REF INT
DECLARE @KULLANICI_REF INT

SELECT 
@STOK_REF        	= R.STOK_REF ,
@MIKTAR             = R.MIKTAR ,
@TAKIP_NO           = R.TAKIP_NO ,
@AMBAR_KODU    		= R.AMBAR_KODU ,
@FB_REF            	= R.FB_REF ,
@FD_REF            	= R.FD_REF ,
@ADRES         		= R.ADRES ,
@HEDEF_ADRES        = R.HEDEF_ADRES ,
@HEDEF_AMBAR 		= R.HEDEF_AMBAR ,
@CARPAN1          	= R.CARPAN1 ,
@CARPAN2          	= R.CARPAN2 ,
@ANABIRIM_REF      	= R.ANABIRIM_REF ,
@HAREKET_TARIHI     = CONVERT(SMALLDATETIME, R.HAREKET_TARIHI) ,
@DURUM_KODU      	= R.DURUM_KODU,
@HEDEF_DURUM      	= R.HEDEF_DURUM,
@PALET      		= R.PALET,
@HEDEF_PALET      	= R.HEDEF_PALET,
@PAKET      		= R.PAKET,
@HEDEF_PAKET      	= R.HEDEF_PAKET,
@BIRIM_REF			= R.BIRIM_REF,
@KONSINYE_REF		= R.KONSINYE_REF,
@KONSINYEFD_REF		= R.KONSINYEFD_REF,
@SD_REF				= R.SD_REF,
@SB_REF				= R.SB_REF,
@IFD_REF			= R.IFD_REF,
@PD_REF				= R.PD_REF,
@PB_REF				= R.PB_REF,
@TD_REF				= R.TD_REF,
@TB_REF				= R.TB_REF,
@STK_TARIHI			= R.STK_TARIHI,
@GBS_TARIHI			= R.GBS_TARIHI,
@GBT_TARIHI			= R.GBT_TARIHI,
@URT_TARIHI			= R.URT_TARIHI,
@RETEST_TARIHI	= R.RETEST_TARIHI,
@ALAN1				= R.ALAN1,
@ALAN2				= R.ALAN2,
@ALAN3				= R.ALAN3,
@ALAN4				= R.ALAN4,
@FIS_GCD			= R.FIS_GCD,
@FIS_TIPI			= R.FIS_TIPI,
@FIS_TURU			= R.FIS_TURU,
@FIRMA_REF			= R.FIRMA_REF,
@KONSINYE_HAREKETI	= R.KONSINYE_HAREKETI,
@KONSINYE_TM		= R.KONSINYE_TM,
@IZLEME_TURU		= R.IZLEME_TURU,
@VARYANT_REF		= R.VARYANT_REF,
@KULLANICI_REF		= R.KULLANICI_REF
FROM DELETED R

IF (@IZLEME_TURU=0 OR @IZLEME_TURU=3 OR @IZLEME_TURU=4) AND @TAKIP_NO<>'' BEGIN SET @TAKIP_NO='' END
IF (@IZLEME_TURU=1 OR @IZLEME_TURU=2) AND @TAKIP_NO='' BEGIN  rollback transaction RAISERROR ('TAKIP_NO can not be null .' , 16, 1) goto sn  END

DECLARE @PB_TURU AS INT SELECT @PB_TURU=PB_TURU FROM PLANLAMAFISLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE PB_REF=@PB_REF
DECLARE @TB_TURU AS INT SELECT @TB_TURU=TB_TURU FROM TALEPFISLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TB_REF=@TB_REF

DECLARE @ETKILEME_YONU AS INT
DECLARE @SIPSEVK AS INT
DECLARE @SIPHRK AS INT
DECLARE @TLPSEVK AS INT
DECLARE @TLPHRK AS INT
DECLARE @UTLPSEVK AS INT
DECLARE @UTLPHRK AS INT
DECLARE @PLNSEVK AS INT
DECLARE @PLNHRK AS INT

SELECT	@SIPSEVK=ISNULL(SIPSEVK,0),
		@SIPHRK=ISNULL(SIPHRK,0),
		@TLPSEVK=ISNULL(TLPSEVK,0),
		@TLPHRK=ISNULL(TLPHRK,0),
		@UTLPSEVK=ISNULL(UTLPSEVK,0),
		@UTLPHRK=ISNULL(UTLPHRK,0),
		@PLNSEVK=ISNULL(PLNSEVK,0),
		@PLNHRK=ISNULL(PLNHRK,0),
		@ETKILEME_YONU=ISNULL(ETKILEME_YONU,0)
	FROM FISTURLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE FIS_TURU=@FIS_TURU

IF @ETKILEME_YONU=1 SET @ETKILEME_YONU=-1 ELSE SET @ETKILEME_YONU=1






IF @KONSINYE_HAREKETI=1 BEGIN
	SELECT @IADE_TARIHI=IADE_TARIHI, @FIS_TARIHI=TARIH FROM STOKFISLERI WITH(NOLOCK)  WHERE FB_REF=@FB_REF
	IF (@FIS_GCD=1 AND @KONSINYE_TM=1) BEGIN
			DELETE KONSINYEDURUM WHERE FD_REF=@FD_REF
	END
	IF (@FIS_GCD=0 AND @KONSINYE_TM=0) BEGIN
			DELETE KONSINYEDURUM WHERE FD_REF=@FD_REF
	END
		
	DECLARE @DDD AS INT 			
	DECLARE @SATIRVARMI AS INT SET @SATIRVARMI=0 		
	SELECT @SATIRVARMI=KONSINYE_REF FROM KONSINYEDURUM WITH(NOLOCK)  WHERE KONSINYE_REF=@KONSINYE_REF 		

	IF (@FIS_GCD=0 AND @KONSINYE_TM=1) BEGIN
		IF @SATIRVARMI<>0 		BEGIN 			
			UPDATE KONSINYEDURUM SET MIKTAR=MIKTAR+@MIKTAR WHERE KONSINYE_REF=@KONSINYE_REF 		
		END ELSE 		BEGIN 			
			INSERT INTO KONSINYEDURUM(FB_REF, TARIH, FIRMA_REF, STOK_REF, BIRIM_REF, MIKTAR, IADE_TARIHI, TAKIP_NO, DURUM_KODU, ACIKLAMA, CARPAN1, CARPAN2, ANABIRIM_REF, FD_REF, TM,VARYANT_REF )
							  SELECT  SH.FB_REF, SF.TARIH, SF.FIRMA_REF, SH.STOK_REF, SH.BIRIM_REF, @MIKTAR, SF.IADE_TARIHI, SH.TAKIP_NO, SH.DURUM_KODU, SH.ACIKLAMA, SH.CARPAN1, SH.CARPAN2, SH.ANABIRIM_REF, SH.FD_REF, '1',VARYANT_REF  FROM STOKHAREKETLERI SH WITH(NOLOCK),STOKFISLERI SF WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SF.FB_REF=SH.FB_REF AND FD_REF=@KONSINYEFD_REF
			SELECT @DDD=SCOPE_IDENTITY()  			
			UPDATE STOKHAREKETLERI SET KONSINYE_REF=@DDD  WHERE KONSINYEFD_REF=@KONSINYEFD_REF
		END 	
	END
	IF (@FIS_GCD=1 AND @KONSINYE_TM=0) BEGIN
		IF @SATIRVARMI<>0 		BEGIN 			
			UPDATE KONSINYEDURUM SET MIKTAR=MIKTAR+@MIKTAR WHERE KONSINYE_REF=@KONSINYE_REF 		
		END ELSE 		BEGIN 			
			INSERT INTO KONSINYEDURUM(FB_REF, TARIH, FIRMA_REF, STOK_REF, BIRIM_REF, MIKTAR, IADE_TARIHI, TAKIP_NO, DURUM_KODU, ACIKLAMA, CARPAN1, CARPAN2, ANABIRIM_REF, FD_REF, TM,VARYANT_REF )
							  SELECT  SH.FB_REF, SF.TARIH, SF.FIRMA_REF, SH.STOK_REF, SH.BIRIM_REF, @MIKTAR, SF.IADE_TARIHI, SH.TAKIP_NO, SH.DURUM_KODU, SH.ACIKLAMA, SH.CARPAN1, SH.CARPAN2, SH.ANABIRIM_REF, SH.FD_REF, '0',VARYANT_REF  FROM STOKHAREKETLERI SH WITH(NOLOCK),STOKFISLERI SF WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SF.FB_REF=SH.FB_REF AND FD_REF=@KONSINYEFD_REF
			SELECT @DDD=SCOPE_IDENTITY()  			
			UPDATE STOKHAREKETLERI SET KONSINYE_REF=@DDD  WHERE KONSINYEFD_REF=@KONSINYEFD_REF
		END 	
	END
END 



--siparişe bağlı bir satırsa SEVK EDİLEN MİKTARA EKLEYECEK
IF ISNULL(@SD_REF,0)>0 BEGIN
	DECLARE @SIPBRMREF AS INT
	SELECT @SIPBRMREF=BIRIM_REF FROM SIPARISHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SD_REF=@SD_REF
	IF  @SIPSEVK=1 AND @SIPHRK=0 BEGIN
			IF @BIRIM_REF=@SIPBRMREF 
			BEGIN
				UPDATE SIPARISHAREKETLERI SET 
					SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR =ISNULL(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR,0) - (@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU)
				WHERE SD_REF=@SD_REF and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
			ELSE
			BEGIN
				UPDATE SIPARISHAREKETLERI SET 
					SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR =ISNULL(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR ,0) - (((@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU)*(@CARPAN2/@CARPAN1))/(CARPAN2/CARPAN1))
				WHERE SD_REF=@SD_REF and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
	END
	IF  @SIPSEVK=0 AND @SIPHRK=1 BEGIN
			IF @BIRIM_REF=@SIPBRMREF 
			BEGIN
				UPDATE SIPARISHAREKETLERI SET 
					HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR,0) - (@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU) 
				WHERE SD_REF=@SD_REF and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
			ELSE
			BEGIN
				UPDATE SIPARISHAREKETLERI SET 
					HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR,0) - (((@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU)*(@CARPAN2/@CARPAN1))/(CARPAN2/CARPAN1)) 
				WHERE SD_REF=@SD_REF and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
	END
	IF  @SIPSEVK=1 AND @SIPHRK=1 BEGIN
			IF @BIRIM_REF=@SIPBRMREF 
			BEGIN
				UPDATE SIPARISHAREKETLERI SET 
					SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR =ISNULL(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR,0)  - (@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU),
					HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR,0) - (@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU) 
				WHERE SD_REF=@SD_REF and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
			ELSE
			BEGIN
				UPDATE SIPARISHAREKETLERI SET 
					SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR =ISNULL(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR ,0) - (((@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU)*(@CARPAN2/@CARPAN1))/(CARPAN2/CARPAN1)), 
					HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR,0) - (((@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU)*(@CARPAN2/@CARPAN1))/(CARPAN2/CARPAN1)) 
				WHERE SD_REF=@SD_REF and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
	END
END
--TALEP bağlı bir satırsa SEVK EDİLEN MİKTARA EKLEYECEK

IF ISNULL(@TD_REF,0)>0 BEGIN
		DECLARE @TDBRMREF AS INT
		SELECT @TDBRMREF=BIRIM_REF FROM TALEPHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TD_REF=@TD_REF

		DECLARE @SVK INT 
		DECLARE @HRK INT 
		IF  @TB_TURU=1  BEGIN SET @SVK=@TLPSEVK SET @HRK=@TLPHRK END
		IF  @TB_TURU=2  BEGIN SET @SVK=@UTLPSEVK SET @HRK=@UTLPHRK END
	 
		IF  @SVK=1 AND @HRK=0 BEGIN
			IF @BIRIM_REF=@TDBRMREF 
			BEGIN
				UPDATE TALEPHAREKETLERI SET 
					SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR,0)-(@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU) 
				WHERE TD_REF=@TD_REF  and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF  AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
			ELSE
			BEGIN
				UPDATE TALEPHAREKETLERI SET 
					SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR,0)-(((@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU)*(@CARPAN2/@CARPAN1))/(CARPAN2/CARPAN1)) 
				WHERE TD_REF=@TD_REF  and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF  AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
		END
		IF  @SVK=0 AND @HRK=1 BEGIN
			IF @BIRIM_REF=@TDBRMREF 
			BEGIN
				UPDATE TALEPHAREKETLERI SET 
					HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR,0)-(@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU) 
				WHERE TD_REF=@TD_REF  and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF  AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
			ELSE
			BEGIN
				UPDATE TALEPHAREKETLERI SET 
					HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR,0)-(((@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU)*(@CARPAN2/@CARPAN1))/(CARPAN2/CARPAN1)) 
				WHERE TD_REF=@TD_REF  and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF  AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
		END
		IF  @SVK=1 AND @HRK=1 BEGIN
			IF @BIRIM_REF=@TDBRMREF 
			BEGIN
				UPDATE TALEPHAREKETLERI SET 
					SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR,0)-(@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU),
					HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR,0)-(@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU) 
				WHERE TD_REF=@TD_REF  and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF  AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
			ELSE
			BEGIN
				UPDATE TALEPHAREKETLERI SET 
					SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR,0)-(((@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU)*(@CARPAN2/@CARPAN1))/(CARPAN2/CARPAN1)),
					HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR,0)-(((@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU)*(@CARPAN2/@CARPAN1))/(CARPAN2/CARPAN1)) 
				WHERE TD_REF=@TD_REF  and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF  AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
		END
END

--PLANLAMAYA bağlı bir satırsa SEVK EDİLEN MİKTARA EKLEYECEK
IF ISNULL(@PD_REF,0)>0 BEGIN
		DECLARE @PDBRMREF AS INT
		SELECT @PDBRMREF=BIRIM_REF FROM PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE PD_REF=@PD_REF
	 
		IF  @PLNSEVK=1 AND @PLNHRK=0 BEGIN
			IF @BIRIM_REF=@PDBRMREF 
			BEGIN
				UPDATE PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI SET 
					SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR,0)-(@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU) 
				WHERE PD_REF=@PD_REF  and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF  AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
			ELSE
			BEGIN
				UPDATE PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI SET 
					SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR,0)-(((@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU)*(@CARPAN2/@CARPAN1))/(CARPAN2/CARPAN1)) 
				WHERE PD_REF=@PD_REF  and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF  AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
		END
		IF  @PLNSEVK=0 AND @PLNHRK=1 BEGIN
			IF @BIRIM_REF=@PDBRMREF 
			BEGIN
				UPDATE PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI SET 
					HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR,0)-(@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU) 
				WHERE PD_REF=@PD_REF  and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF  AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
			ELSE
			BEGIN
				UPDATE PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI SET 
					HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR,0)-(((@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU)*(@CARPAN2/@CARPAN1))/(CARPAN2/CARPAN1)) 
				WHERE PD_REF=@PD_REF  and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF  AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
		END
		IF  @PLNSEVK=1 AND @PLNHRK=1 BEGIN
			IF @BIRIM_REF=@PDBRMREF 
			BEGIN
				UPDATE PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI SET 
					SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR,0)-(@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU),
					HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR,0)-(@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU) 
				WHERE PD_REF=@PD_REF  and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF  AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
			ELSE
			BEGIN
				UPDATE PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI SET 
					SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR,0)-(((@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU)*(@CARPAN2/@CARPAN1))/(CARPAN2/CARPAN1)),
					HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR=ISNULL(HAREKETEDEN_MIKTAR,0)-(((@MIKTAR*@ETKILEME_YONU)*(@CARPAN2/@CARPAN1))/(CARPAN2/CARPAN1))
				WHERE PD_REF=@PD_REF  and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF  AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
			END
		END
END

--İADE bağlı bir satırsa İADE MİKTARA EKLEYECEK
IF ISNULL(@IFD_REF,0)>0 BEGIN
	DECLARE @FDBRMREF AS INT
	SELECT @FDBRMREF=BIRIM_REF FROM STOKHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE FD_REF=@IFD_REF
	IF @BIRIM_REF=@FDBRMREF 
	BEGIN
		UPDATE STOKHAREKETLERI SET 
		IADE_MIKTAR =ISNULL(IADE_MIKTAR,0) - (@MIKTAR)
		WHERE FD_REF=@IFD_REF and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		UPDATE STOKHAREKETLERI SET 
		IADE_MIKTAR =ISNULL(IADE_MIKTAR ,0) - (((@MIKTAR)*(@CARPAN2/@CARPAN1))/(CARPAN2/CARPAN1))
		WHERE FD_REF=@IFD_REF and STOK_REF=@STOK_REF AND VARYANT_REF=@VARYANT_REF 
	END
END



sn:
